display_name: Google DeepMind’s Lyria 3 is an advanced AI music generation model that creates high-fidelity, up to three-minute tracks from text or image prompts, with detailed control over vocals, style, and compo
description:
Google DeepMind’s Lyria 3 is an advanced AI music generation model that creates high-fidelity, up to three-minute tracks from text or image prompts, with detailed control over vocals, style, and composition.

Optional parameters:
Full song: Turn it on to generate a full-length track (up to 3 minutes).

Notes:
Lyria blocks prompts that name specific artists or songs (artist-intent and recitation checks).
